blended.narrative: Chestnut Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.1 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,135 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

Wednesday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
